svg.title: One /research run in timelapse: findings land as a new wiki-linked cluster, hubs and a meta-analysis form, synthesis links weld it into neighboring knowledge bases, and one router row indexes it at 00-Index.

g.text: ① gather: /research fans out, findings land as wiki-linked docs
② structure: hubs form, a meta-analysis becomes the front door
③ synthesis: the new KB welds into every cluster it touches
④ index: one router row, and the next session routes straight in

svg.text: new knowledge lands wired in, not filed away: linked, synthesized, and routable next session
